# Moly — Lido MCP Server + Dashboard + CLI

> Connect any MCP-compatible AI agent to the Lido staking protocol on Ethereum.
> Stake ETH, manage positions, wrap/unwrap tokens, handle withdrawals, and participate in DAO governance through 28 MCP tools.

## Site Structure

- / — Landing page (overview, install guide, developer docs links)
- /dashboard — AI chat dashboard with live Lido data, simulation/live toggle, testnet/mainnet toggle
- /docs — Full documentation
- /docs/setup — Installation guide
- /docs/configuration — Configuration reference
- /docs/architecture — System architecture
- /docs/mcp-server — MCP server overview
- /docs/mcp-server/connect — Connect any agent
- /docs/mcp-server/code-samples — Code samples
- /docs/cli — CLI package (npx @moly-mcp/lido)
- /docs/cli/setup — Setup wizard
- /docs/cli/configuration — Config reference
- /docs/tools — All tools overview
- /docs/tools/read — Read tools
- /docs/tools/write — Write tools
- /docs/tools/governance — Governance tools

## MCP Endpoint

URL: https://moly-lido.vercel.app/api/mcp
Transport: Streamable HTTP (POST)
Authentication: None required

## Configuration Headers (optional)

- x-lido-mode: "simulation" (default) | "live"
- x-lido-network: "testnet" (default) | "mainnet"
- x-lido-chain: "hoodi" (default for testnet) | "ethereum" (default for mainnet)

## All Tools (28)

### Read Tools (7)

get_balance
  Get ETH, stETH, and wstETH balances for an Ethereum address.
  Params: address (string, required)
  Returns: { address, network, chain, balances: { eth, stETH, wstETH } }

get_rewards
  Get staking reward history for an address.
  Params: address (string), days (number, default 7)
  Returns: { address, network, period, note }

get_conversion_rate
  Get current stETH/wstETH exchange rate.
  Params: none
  Returns: { network, 1_stETH_in_wstETH, 1_wstETH_in_stETH, note }

get_withdrawal_requests
  Get pending withdrawal request IDs for an address.
  Params: address (string)
  Returns: { address, network, requests, count }

get_withdrawal_status
  Get finalization status for specific withdrawal requests.
  Params: request_ids (string[])
  Returns: { network, requestIds, statuses }

get_proposals
  Get recent Lido DAO governance proposals with vote counts.
  Params: count (number, default 5)
  Returns: { network, total, proposals: [{ id, open, executed, startDate, yea, nay, votingPower }] }

get_proposal
  Get full details for a single governance proposal.
  Params: proposal_id (number)
  Returns: { network, id, open, executed, startDate, snapshotBlock, supportRequired, minAcceptQuorum, yea, nay, votingPower }

### Write Tools (6)

All write tools return simulation results by default (gas estimates, expected outputs).
Set dry_run: false to broadcast real transactions.

stake_eth
  Stake ETH to receive stETH.
  Params: amount (string), dry_run (boolean, default true)
  Returns: { simulated, network, action, amountEth, estimatedGas, expectedStETH, mode, note }

request_withdrawal
  Queue stETH for withdrawal from Lido.
  Params: amount (string), dry_run (boolean, default true)
  Returns: { simulated, network, action, amountSteth, note }

claim_withdrawals
  Claim ETH from finalized withdrawal requests.
  Params: request_ids (string[]), dry_run (boolean, default true)
  Returns: { simulated, network, action, requestIds, note }

wrap_steth
  Wrap stETH into wstETH (non-rebasing DeFi wrapper).
  Params: amount (string), dry_run (boolean, default true)
  Returns: { simulated, network, action, amountSteth, expectedWstETH, note }

unwrap_wsteth
  Unwrap wstETH back to stETH.
  Params: amount (string), dry_run (boolean, default true)
  Returns: { simulated, network, action, amountWsteth, expectedStETH, note }

cast_vote
  Cast a vote on a Lido DAO governance proposal.
  Params: proposal_id (number), support (boolean), dry_run (boolean, default true)
  Returns: { simulated, network, action, proposalId, vote, proposal, note }

## Supported Networks

Hoodi Testnet (default)
  Chain ID: 560048
  stETH: 0x3508A952...
  wstETH: 0x7E99eE3C...
  Withdrawal Queue: 0xfe56573...
  Voting: 0x49B3512c...

Ethereum Mainnet
  Chain ID: 1
  stETH: 0xae7ab965...
  wstETH: 0x7f39C581...
  Withdrawal Queue: 0x889edC2e...
  Voting: 0x2e59A20f...

## CLI Package

Package: @moly-mcp/lido
Install: npx @moly-mcp/lido
Purpose: Interactive setup wizard. Configures Claude Desktop and other MCP clients automatically.

## Dashboard

URL: https://moly-lido.vercel.app/dashboard
Features:
- AI chat powered by Claude (Sonnet)
- Real-time Lido data sidebar (balances, APR, governance proposals)
- Simulation mode: dry-run all transactions before signing
- Live mode: broadcast real transactions
- Testnet (Hoodi) and Mainnet support
- Track any Ethereum address

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 16, TypeScript
- Lido Ethereum SDK v4.7.0
- Model Context Protocol SDK v1.27.1
- Vercel AI SDK
- Viem v2, Tailwind CSS v4

## Source

GitHub: https://github.com/daiwikmh/moly
Docs: https://moly-lido.vercel.app/docs
Dashboard: https://moly-lido.vercel.app/dashboard
MCP endpoint: https://moly-lido.vercel.app/api/mcp
